title: After the Japanese Derby: Positive Words

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon wins the Japanese Derby. In the
midst of the applause, she officially challenges
Rice Shower, acknowledging her as her biggest
rival in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The crowd goes wild. On the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser expresses her
disappointment at the post-race press
conference, but still shows enthusiasm for the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her optimism at the press conference touches the
hearts of viewers. As with every other race,
Matikanetannhauser is heading to the Kikuka Sho
with the intent to win.
